title: Evo Tech targets government defense agencies with AI analytics platform
description: Evo Tech is pushing its Evolution AI platform into U.S. defense and intelligence markets, targeting agencies that need real-time threat detection across large data volumes. The defense AI market is projected to hit $13.7 billion by 2028.

title: Delaware court uses CEO's AI chat logs as evidence in $250 million earnout dispute
description: A Delaware court ruled a CEO's AI chat logs are discoverable evidence, using them to prove intent in a $250 million merger dispute. The CEO deleted the logs, which the court treated as proof of concealment.

title: Musk calls for government cash to counter AI job losses
description: Elon Musk is calling for the government to guarantee “Universal HIGH INCOME” for Americans to offset looming job losses caused by artificial intelligence.

title: Slow revenue conversion to dog IT companies as AI queers the pitch
description: Decline in annual revenue runs at even the biggest in Indian IT, such as Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) and Wipro, despite healthy deal pipelines suggests persistence of both slow revenue conversion and discounts spawned by competition from AI, analysts said.

title: AI pushing IT companies to lower service costs: Analysts
description: Decline in annual revenue runs at even the biggest in Indian IT, such as Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) and Wipro, despite healthy deal pipelines suggests persistence of both slow revenue conversion and discounts spawned by competition from AI, analysts said.
